title: Minik Kedi Miyav
description: Minik bir kedinin bahçede hayvanlarla tanışma macerası. Hayvan seslerini öğrenelim!
style: 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting, cinematic composition, high detail, Disney Pixar render quality

characterDescription.base: a cute small orange-white spotted kitten with big adorable eyes
characterDescription.notes: Sevimli, turuncu-beyaz benekli minik kedi karakteri

scenes.title: Kedi Uyandı
scenes.prompt: A cute small orange-white spotted kitten with big adorable eyes opening its eyes on a colorful pillow. Light blue simple background, soft morning light. The kitten looks sleepy and cute. 3D Pixar animated movie style, vibrant colors, warm lighting, cinematic composition, high detail.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel light blue background with subtle paw print watermark patterns, gentle watercolor texture, warm and dreamy atmosphere, children's book illustration style, no text, no characters

scenes.title: Köpek Havladı
scenes.text:
Bahçede köpek gördü.
Köpek "Hav hav!" dedi.

"Fır fır fır!" yaptı.

scenes.title: Mutlu Son
scenes.text:
Anne kedi yavruyu yaladı.
"Mırr mırr!" yaptılar.
Mutlu oldular.
scenes.prompt: Mother cat grooming the small kitten, both cuddled together looking happy and content. Soft warm light around them. Beautiful orange-pink sunset sky in the background. A loving family moment. 3D Pixar animated movie style, warm emotional scene, golden hour lighting.
scenes.textPagePrompt: Soft pastel warm sunset orange-pink gradient background with subtle heart patterns, gentle loving watercolor texture, warm and cozy family atmosphere, children's book style, no text, no characters

funFacts.title: Biliyor muydun? 🐾
facts: Kedilerin bıyıkları onlara yön bulmada yardımcı olur.
Bir kedinin kalbi dakikada 110-140 kez atar!
